title: Pogonospermum leucoderme
intro: Pogonospermum leucoderme, also known as Javanese teak or white-stemmed Pogonospermum, is a plant species in the family Rutaceae, native to Indonesia. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine, and its health benefits include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in the treatment of various ailments, including fever, respiratory issues, and wounds. The bioactive constituents of Pogonospermum leucoderme include limonoids, alkaloids, and flavonoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its health benefits and promote overall well-being.
